engaged_works.title: Ethics Elwes
engaged_works.ascription_notes: Routed from the 2026-05-10 Tier-1 publication backlog as an on-disk source witness.
engaged_works.summary: This on-disk text is being wired into the Source tab as a citation witness for Spinoza, Ethics Elwes. The entry is intentionally minimal: it records the routed file and basic bibliographic shape so the site can surface the source while fuller review waits. A later pass should tighten the title, edition, and passage coverage against the on-disk witness.

core_thesis: Spinoza argues that there is one infinite substance, Deus sive Natura, of which finite things are modes rather than self-subsisting beings ([Ethics IP14](cite://spinoza/ethics/1.P14); [IP15](cite://spinoza/ethics/1.P15)). Mind and body are the same order expressed under different attributes, so causation is immanent and necessity runs through both thought and extension ([IIP7](cite://spinoza/ethics/2.P7); [IP28](cite://spinoza/ethics/1.P28)). Freedom is therefore adequate understanding of one's place in this necessity, not exemption from it ([VP3](cite://spinoza/ethics/5.P3); [VP42](cite://spinoza/ethics/5.P42)).

cross_engagements.brief: Akalanka presses the same substrate structure axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `many-coordinate-reals` rather than `one-self-standing`.
Abhinavagupta presses the same manifestation status axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `expressive-manifestation` rather than `dependent-real`.
Adi Sankara presses the same identity relation axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `non-otherness` rather than `self-expression-or-appearance`.
Alfred North Whitehead presses the same temporal mode axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `process-primary` rather than `substance-primary`.
Akshapada Gautama presses the same soteric end axis in the soteriological register, but with the value `isolation-or-discriminative-release` rather than `not-soteriological`.
Baladeva Vidyabhushana presses the same causation model axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `unchanged-ground-with-changing-power` rather than `immanent-expression`.
